legacy_behavior: Handles full CRF data import pipeline: file upload via MultipartRequestâ†’ODM XML validation (1.3/1.2.1 schema)â†’Castor unmarshallingâ†’study metadata validationâ†’event CRF status checkâ†’data type validationâ†’edit checksâ†’summary stats generationâ†’forward to verifyImport.jsp. spa_or_api_coverage: ImportUploadController (POST /api/legacy/import/upload) stages files but does NOT process. SPA ImportManager uploads then opens legacy servlet in new window.
